isi.lyrics:
Lyric itssiu - Say you will…

Romanization

Say you will
Say you will always love me
Say you will always want me
Say you will always miss me And need me

Tonight, I’m drunk and miss you a lot
But you already belong to someone
else I’ve held back my longing
for a while
But its echoes are getting too loud

My winter, summer And two seasons
I miss you for 25 hours You asked me,
"Why is that the reason?"
'Cause we have a one-hour time difference

My winter, summer
And two seasons
I miss you for 25 hours
I know we don’t have a chance together
So let me imagine

Say you will Say you will always
love me Say you will always want me
Say you will always miss me And need me

Hangeul

Say you will
Say you will always love me
Say you will always want me
Say you will always miss me And need me

Tonight, I’m drunk and miss you a lot
But you already belong to someone
else I’ve held back my longing
for a while
But its echoes are getting too loud

My winter, summer And two seasons
I miss you for 25 hours You asked me,
"Why is that the reason?"
'Cause we have a one-hour time difference

My winter, summer
And two seasons
I miss you for 25 hours
I know we don’t have a chance together
So let me imagine

Say you will Say you will always
love me Say you will always want me
Say you will always miss me And need me
